concerns.text: User Story 2 (Predict Training Response) has no anchored FR or SC. The story requires predicting 'working-memory gain' (post-pre), but FR-005 and SC-001/002 assume this data exists without explicitly anchoring to the story's specific requirement for a 'training intervention' dataset. If the dataset (ds000277) lacks this variable, the FR/SC cannot be satisfied, leaving the story unbacked by a feasible requirement.

User Story 3 (Visualize and Report) is not explicitly anchored to any FR or SC. While FR-006 mentions generating a PDF report with plots, it does not explicitly reference 'User Story 3' or 'US-3'. The acceptance criteria for US-3 (effect_sizes.pdf) are not explicitly covered by a Success Criterion (SC) that names the story.

FR-008 (Resource Constraints) is not anchored to any User Story. It defines strict runtime and hardware limits (6 hours, 2 cores) but does not state which story (e.g., US-1, US-2, or the overall pipeline) it serves. This creates a potential orphan requirement.

FR-009 (ID Validation) is not anchored to any User Story. It mandates a fatal error on missing IDs but does not reference the story it supports (likely US-1 or US-2). Without an anchor, it is an orphan requirement.

SC-003 (Power Analysis) is not anchored to any User Story. It requires a 'power_analysis.txt' artifact but no story explicitly demands a power analysis report as a deliverable. This is an orphan success criterion.
SC-005 (Runtime Recording) is not anchored to any User Story. It requires a 'runtime.log' file, but no story explicitly lists 'runtime logging' as a deliverable. This is an orphan success criterion.
